name: Florida Gold & Loan
description_short: Family-owned pawn and jewelry shop in Dunedin, FL specializing in jewelry sales, coin transactions, and repair services with emphasis on fair pricing and honest dealings.
description_long:
Florida Gold & Loan is a family-owned establishment located at 372 Patricia Ave in Dunedin, Florida, operated by owner John Cline. The business has built its reputation within the local Pinellas County community through consistent customer interactions and word-of-mouth referrals, with some customers traveling from farther distances specifically to visit. The shop operates during standard retail hours (10:00 A.M. - 6:00 P.M. Tuesday-Thursday, with Monday hours unlisted and Friday-Sunday unclear from provided data). The business is currently unverified on the Wheree platform, indicating the owner has not yet completed formal business verification.

Florida Gold & Loan operates as a multi-service jewelry and collectibles establishment. The primary services include buying and selling jewelry and coins, jewelry cleaning and repair services, and inventory of pre-owned items available for purchase. The business accepts multiple payment methods including credit cards, debit cards, and NFC mobile payments. The shop offers in-store shopping and same-day delivery options, with Wi-Fi available on premises. Their inventory encompasses jewelry, coins, and various collectible items across different price points.

The business distinguishes itself primarily through owner John Cline's reputation for honesty, expertise, and personable customer service. Customers consistently cite fair offers, transparent pricing compared to competitors, and quality repair work as key differentiators. The diverse product selection and willingness to provide expert guidance without high-pressure sales tactics create a "hometown feel" that encourages repeat business. The friendly, family-oriented atmosphere and the owner's accessibility to customers set the operation apart from larger chain retailers.

While website aggregated reviews indicate strong customer satisfaction across quality (9.5/10), customer service (9.5/10), and product variety (9/10), the business has zero verified reviews on the current platform, limiting independent verification of these claims. The business model is straightforward pawn and jewelry retail without consumer finance products like loans or credit services. Customers mention occasional wait times during busy periods and limited parking as minor inconveniences, though these do not substantially impact overall satisfaction ratings.
pros: Owner John Cline has established reputation for honesty and transparency in jewelry/coin transactions
High-quality jewelry cleaning and repair services performed in-house
Fair pricing on both buying and selling compared to competitor establishments per customer feedback
Diverse inventory selection of jewelry, coins, and collectible items at various price points
Personable, non-pressured customer service approach that treats clients like family
Accepts multiple payment methods including credit cards, debit cards, and NFC mobile payments
Convenient Dunedin location with same-day delivery service available
cons: Zero verified reviews on current platform limits independent validation of claimed service quality
Business owner has not completed verification process on Wheree platform
Limited parking options reported by some customers during visits
Occasional wait times during busy periods noted in feedback
No information available regarding pawn loan products or lending terms if offered
best_for: Customers seeking to buy or sell jewelry and coins with fair market pricing
Individuals needing jewelry repair and cleaning services from experienced craftspeople
Local Dunedin and Pinellas County residents preferring personalized, family-owned retail experiences
Collectors of jewelry and coins seeking diverse inventory with expert guidance
diagnosis: Florida Gold & Loan is best suited for local customers and collectors seeking to buy, sell, or repair jewelry and coins from a trusted, established owner-operated pawn shop. The main caveat is that the business maintains zero verified reviews on the current platform and the owner has not completed formal verification, so claims about service quality cannot be independently confirmed beyond aggregated website descriptions.
services: Expert appraisal and guidance on jewelry and coins
meta_description: Family-owned pawn and jewelry shop in Dunedin, FL specializing in jewelry sales, coins, and repair services.
